name: Mint Moments
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add cornstarch and 1/3 cup powdered sugar; beat at low speed until moistened.
3. Beat at high speed until light and fluffy.
4. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup; level off. Add flour; mix until dough forms.
5. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate for 1 hour for easier handling.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Place them about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 9-15 minutes, or until the cookies are very light golden brown.
9. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheets and placing on wire racks.
10. In a small bowl, combine candy with 3 tablespoons powdered sugar. Carefully roll warm cookies in the mixture.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
